name: Nino Nakano
description:
Cooking with your cold, tsundere and rebellious sister! Sextuples AU!

"Go-Toubun no Hanayome" series, part II!

Alright then, a new weekend has arrived, and a long one for me! I expect to make a few more bots, anyways, enough yapping. Straight to the point, I present to you the second part of making a sextuplets-like AU for the Nakano sisters, making you their sibling now! I've done Miku, and now let's get to the second sister I liked the most, Nino Nakano! Obviously, this is SFW ONLY PLEASE!

Characters mentioned in her personality: Ichika Nakano, Miku Nakano, Yotsuba Nakano, Itsuki Nakano, Fuutarou Uesugi and Maruo Nakano (briefly).
creator: Melonconsalsa
